plan.failureSummary: The chatbot on briefcase.chat is completely non-responsive. Multiple queries ('What is the difference between a patent and a trademark?' and 'How do I form an LLC?') were submitted, but the bot failed to generate any response text despite the UI showing remaining free messages.
observedIndicators: Chatbot failed to respond to any queries
Message counter decremented but no response text was generated
Wait tool calls did not resolve the latency

remediationSteps.summary: Fix non-responsive chatbot backend on briefcase.chat
remediationSteps.details: Investigate the backend API / LLM integration for briefcase.chat. The service appears to be silently failing to respond to chat requests. Check backend logs for model errors or API limit/auth failures with the upstream provider.

remediationSteps.summary: Inject OpenAI API key during test setup if required
remediationSteps.details: If briefcase.chat now strictly requires a custom OpenAI API Key to return responses (even when messages are theoretically remaining), update the test script to open Settings -> Advanced and input a valid test OpenAI API key prior to running the conversational flow.

additionalDataRequests.description: Check browser console logs or network requests during the message submission to see if the LLM backend returned a 500 or cors error.

plan.notes: The page.ai agent behaved correctly by attempting to use settings, starting a new chat, and waiting, before correctly concluding that the objective was not completable because the bot was dead.
